name: Musian
description: Play music from your Jellyfin library by selecting a mood on a visual emotion wheel (Valence–Arousal model).
overview: Click anywhere on the colour wheel to match music to how you feel. The wheel maps High/Low energy on the vertical axis and Positive/Negative mood on the horizontal axis.

versions.changelog: fix: playlist now loops when dedup blocks all prefetch results (small libraries no longer stop after 25 songs).
feat: 5 mood labels on disc, 25-track fetch limit to prevent playlist stopping after 10 songs.
feat: genre bar dot shows current song era zone on every track change.
Fix: jmFetch defined in outer scope — was crashing all JS on page load (genre bar, disc, search all broken).
Code review fixes: audio focus, fetch timeouts, listener accumulation, poll interval, generation guards, normalizeTracks.
Fix critical JS bugs: SyntaxError preventing script load, broken wheel click handler, missing debug DOM elements, and broken play button using undefined serverId.
